title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This result has far exceeded my expectations!
Think of all the experiments I can use these
plushies in!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
For instance, I could equip each one with AI
modeled after different Umamusume and use
motor technology to conduct tabletop
scrimmages simulating real races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you showing sympathy for inorganic
objects? You really are an interesting guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll make a display with the plushies! In exchange,
let me study your emotional instability!
